title: Screens UI
scenario: Verify that every screen in the Onboarding flow matches the UI design specified in Figma.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the Onboarding flow.
Go through each screen in the Onboarding flow one by one.
For each screen, compare the actual UI elements (layout, colors, fonts, icons, text, spacing, etc.) against the Figma design specifications.
Note any discrepancies found between the implementation and the Figma design.
expected: Every screen in the Onboarding flow matches the UI design specified in Figma.
